name: Joey Rosen Senior Vice President, Central Division - BluPrint Home Loans
description_short: BluPrint Home Loans (NFM Lending division) offers mortgage lending for home purchases, refinances, and investment properties, led by SVP Joey Rosen with CPA and financial planning background.
description_long:
BluPrint Home Loans operates as a division of NFM Lending, a mortgage company with corporate headquarters in Encinitas, California. Joey Rosen serves as Senior Vice President of the Central Division and brings a unique professional background to the role—he is a licensed CPA and financial planner, and grew up in the mortgage industry after his father founded First Home Mortgage in Mount Prospect, Illinois in 1986. This family heritage combined with formal financial training positions Rosen as a loan officer with both industry roots and advanced analytical credentials.

The company offers conventional mortgages, FHA loans, VA loans, USDA loans, refinancing options, and investment property financing. They provide mortgage calculators including payment calculators, refinance calculators, affordable house calculators, loan comparison tools, and buydown calculators. Services extend to first-time homebuyers, seasoned investors, and borrowers seeking refinancing solutions. Joey Rosen's office is located in Chicago at 10 S Riverside Plaza and serves clients across multiple states where NFM Lending holds licensing.

What distinguishes this offering is Rosen's dual expertise as both a traditional loan officer and a financial planner with CPA credentials. His stated value proposition emphasizes availability beyond standard business hours (24/7 accessibility rather than 9-5 service) and a consultative approach that positions the home purchase as part of broader financial planning. The company emphasizes customer-centric service and positions itself as "America's Common Sense Lender."

However, several limitations should be noted. As a division of a larger lender (NFM Lending), the company operates within broader institutional constraints and underwriting requirements. Financing is subject to debt-to-income ratios, underwriting requirements, and verification of income, employment, credit, and home value. The website contains incomplete content (text cuts off mid-sentence in footer disclaimers), and refinancing can result in higher total finance charges over a loan's life. Service availability may vary by state, and not all programs are available in all areas.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Joey Rosen holds both CPA and financial planner credentials, providing deeper financial analysis than typical loan officers
Advertises 24/7 availability to clients, not limited to standard 9-5 business hours
Family legacy in mortgage business since 1986 provides institutional knowledge and experience
Offers multiple mortgage products including conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, and investment property loans
Provides comprehensive mortgage calculators (payment, refinance, affordable house, comparison, buydown)
Serves first-time homebuyers, seasoned investors, and refinancing customers across multiple states
Part of NFM Lending, a registered mortgage lender with NMLS #2893 and Equal Housing Lender certification
cons: Website content is incomplete with cut-off disclaimers and footer text, suggesting potential maintenance issues
Financing subject to standard debt-to-income and underwriting requirements that may limit eligibility
Refinancing can result in higher total finance charges over the life of the loan compared to original mortgage
Service and product availability varies by state, with no guarantee all programs available in borrower's location
Pre-approval is contingent on no changes to financial status, making approval conditional and reversible
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking personalized financial guidance beyond standard loan origination
Real estate investors and seasoned borrowers who benefit from CPA-level financial analysis
Borrowers in Illinois and surrounding Midwest states served by the Central Division office
Clients who value after-hours availability and consultative relationship-based lending
diagnosis: BluPrint Home Loans is best for homebuyers and refinancers seeking a loan officer with dual CPA and financial planning expertise rather than a standard lending originator. The main caveat is that actual loan approval remains subject to underwriting, debt-to-income verification, and institutional requirements, and not all programs are available in all states.
services: USDA loans (100% financing, no down payment required)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 10 S Riverside Plaza Office 8054, Suite 875, Chicago, IL 60606
